title: Supply Chain Manager - Gateway Distriparks - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Gateway Distriparks - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the Gateway Distriparks family as a Supply Chain Manager in Howrah. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Gateway Distriparks:
Gateway Distriparks is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gateway Distriparks!
